_comment: X1 cross-binding equivalence fixture (0.8.0 Slice 5 / G1). Both the Python (test_functional_search.py) and TypeScript (functional-search.test.ts) functional harnesses write this exact corpus, run these exact queries, and assert the engine returns the listed bodies (as structured SearchHits) — proving the two FFI bindings surface equivalent hits for the same DB + query. Bodies are FTS-only (no vector kind configured), so the result is deterministic across bindings without a network embedder.
